items.briefing:
A serious security flaw called "WP2Shell" is putting millions of WordPress websites at risk of being taken over by attackers remotely — if your organisation runs a WordPress site, ensure it is updated immediately. Separately, business email compromise (BEC) phishing attacks are becoming harder to detect, with attackers combining multiple tricks to bypass security filters; staff should remain cautious about unexpected emails requesting payments or sensitive information.

Australian firms are increasingly moving toward consolidated security tools to manage costs and complexity. **Practical tip:** Check that any WordPress websites your organisation manages are running the latest version and all plugins are up to date.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: AI security incidents already affecting majority of Australian organisations, signaling urgent need for defensive strategies.
